title: panicum sanguinale subvar. marginatum
intro: Panicum sanguinale subvar. marginatum, also known as Red-top panic grass or Red-topped panic grass, is a subvariant of the Panicum sanguinale species, a type of grass native to North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve coughs, and act as an expectorant. The health benefits of Panicum sanguinale subvar. marginatum include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower fever and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
